---
name: Dataset request
about: Request a new process or material to be added to the database
title: "[Dataset Request] "
labels: enhancement, dataset-request
---

## Requested process or material

Describe what you'd like to see added (e.g., a specific finishing process, a new fiber type).

## Why is this important?

Explain the relevance (industry usage, regulatory requirement, gap in current coverage).

## Known data sources

List any references, papers, or databases that could support building this dataset.

## Additional context

Any other details that would help (functional unit, system boundary suggestions, etc.).
